prompt: A richly detailed classic JRPG-style isometric town scene inspired by late-1990s fantasy role-playing games, shown from a high three-quarter top-down angle like a pre-rendered game background with hand-painted textures and small sprite-like characters. In the center of a sunlit stone plaza, 2 young adventurer characters stand facing each other in conversation: a spiky red-haired teenage boy wearing a blue tunic, orange scarf, brown gloves, and sturdy boots, and a blonde teenage girl with a high ponytail wearing a pale mint-green dress with a white short-sleeved top and brown shoes. Surround them with weathered cobblestone paving, soft midday light, and long dramatic shadows cast across the square. At the upper center, place an ornate stone bell arch with 2 carved columns, floral vines climbing the pillars, and a hanging bronze bell above a neatly trimmed rectangular grass bed dotted with tiny yellow flowers. At the upper left, include a purple-canopied stall or tent entrance with a patterned rug and 1 small chibi-style NPC vendor standing inside, wearing green clothes and an orange vest. Frame the lower half with elegant white stone railings, 2 recessed flower alcoves filled with red blossoms, and multiple staircases descending out of the plaza. Add 4 visible red banners with gold emblems attached to silver flagpoles, 2 on the left side and 2 on the right side, fluttering diagonally. The architecture should feel medieval-fantasy but clean and charming, with highly detailed masonry, vibrant foliage, nostalgic console-era adventure game atmosphere, polished remastered sprite art, and no user interface or text.
